problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
hypothesis: If Photocatalytic oxidation under visible light is applied to rapidly, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
